explorer.fileNesting.patterns.package.json: *.mjs, *.json, *.yml, *.yaml, tsconfig*, LICENSE, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, OPENCODE.md, VERSION, DOCKER.md, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, .dockerignore, .envrc, CITATION.cff, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CONTRIBUTORS.md, DATA_CONTRACT.md, GOVERNANCE.md, LEGAL_DISCLAIMER.md, SECURITY.md, SUPPORT.md, TRADEMARK.md, CHANGELOG.md, pnpm-workspace.yaml, pnpm-lock.yaml
